nodes.name: Beautiful gradients with smooth transitions, generated entirely in CSS.
Convert HTML to editable Figma layers without leaving your browser.
Author your interface in HTML and CSS, then copy a clipboard payload that pastes as editable Figma layers — no plugin, no export step.
Text nodes ship with real glyphs and metrics — fully editable on paste, no flattening.
Inline SVG icons round-trip as vector networks — strokes, dashes, and compound paths intact.
Padding, gaps, shadows, gradients, and per-corner radii all translate to native Figma properties.
